title: Issue 2231 state-delta summary orientation

execplan_profile.projection_rule: canonical_core is authoritative for intent, scope, next action, proof, continuation, and closeout; legacy fields remain compatibility projections.

canonical_core.requested_outcome: Make repeated equivalent summary emit an unchanged-projection delta before rebuilding full output, and make startup carry active-planning orientation so an immediate unchanged summary is unnecessary.
canonical_core.hard_constraints: Extend existing projection reuse and startup state-delta surfaces; do not add a parallel cache, global terse mode, or hidden blocker/proof suppression.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Local implementation details, dependency query shape, compact startup projection fields, and focused regression placement.
canonical_core.escalate_when: The fix requires changing planning package state semantics, hiding changed proof/blockers, or widening public command contracts beyond summary/startup orientation.
canonical_core.next_action: Commit the validated #2231 change and open the draft PR.
proof_expectations: uv run ruff check src/agentic_workspace/projection_reuse.py src/agentic_workspace/workspace_runtime_primitives.py src/agentic_workspace/workspace_runtime_startup.py tests/test_workspace_projection_reuse.py tests/test_workspace_cli.py
uv run python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py summary --target . --format json
uv run python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
uv run python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py report --target . --section runtime_mirror_consistency --format json
completion_criteria: Repeated equivalent summary calls use dependency-aware projection reuse and emit compact unchanged deltas.
Summary reuse invalidates on declared planning/runtime dependencies and not on irrelevant revision-only changes.
Startup active-planning orientation exposes embedded compact summary facts and avoids default summary read-first loops.
Full detail and force refresh remain available through verbose summary and AW_PROJECTION_FORCE_REFRESH.
Existing doctor/report reuse semantics and tiny startup budgets remain sound.
canonical_core.closeout_decision: slice implemented and validated; issue closure waits for PR review/merge

goal: Make repeated equivalent summary emit an unchanged-projection delta before rebuilding full output, and make startup carry active-planning orientation so an immediate unchanged summary is unnecessary.

Do not add a global terse mode or replace doctor/report reuse semantics.
Do not close parent #1969 or related larger lanes from this slice alone.
